name: Comeketo Agent — Unified Design System v1
subject: The canonical style, interaction, information, and meaning standard for every screen and surface in the Comeketo Agent app. Authored from Jake's 25-principle unification brief + the three reference surfaces he flagged as the target aesthetic (attribution donut with pill filters, channel decision-grid with status dots, Anchor-the-Close-sweep markdown project panel). Upstream feedstock for UI code, Rodbot proposal-writing, and every future delegation that touches the front end. Pair file: knowledge/design_system_v1.md.

core_thesis.one_line: Comeketo Agent is a calm operational intelligence system that helps a human notice, decide, delegate, remember, and ship.
every_screen_test: a place where the system notices
a place where it structures judgment
a place where it routes action
a place where it preserves memory
a place where it reflects meaning back to the operator
core_thesis.foreign_object_rule: If a page does not cleanly fit one of the five roles above, it will feel foreign. Either recast the page to match or remove it.

color_palette.naming_convention: Semantic tokens first, raw hex behind them. Always use the token.

bg_paper.role: Page background. Warm neutral. The room itself.

bg_panel.role: Slightly lighter than paper — cards and surfaces that sit above the page.

bg_sunken.role: Rare. Zones that should recede — empty-state wells, secondary history.

edge_soft.role: Hairline separator. Replace any hard gray border.

ink_primary.role: Titles, primary body. Dark slate — not black. Preserves paper feel.

ink_faint.role: Annotation, helper text, deselected pill labels.

ink_inverse.role: Text on the deep-slate selected pill / primary button.

accent_family.intent: Restrained, dusty, paper-compatible. Never saturated. Used to tag categories and carry meaning, not to excite.

lavender.semantic: inferred by Rodbot / referral / soft authority

primary_actionable.role: Selected pill, primary action. Deep indigo-slate. Reserved. Used at most once per zone.

state_dots.rule: State dots live top-right of cards, 6px diameter, no ring. One dot per card maximum.

color_palette.usage_ratio: Approx 75% paper/panel, 15% ink, 8% one accent, 2% primary actionable. If a screen crosses 3 accents simultaneously, refactor.

families.serif_brand: For identity, page-level rhetoric, hero numerals, rare emotional emphasis. Use for the app name, the big number in a KPI tile, section titles that carry gravity (e.g. 'Anchor the Close sweep').
families.sans_operational: For navigation, data, controls, metadata, forms, labels, body. Default everywhere that is not carrying meaning.

typography.numeric_emphasis: Big numbers (donut center, KPI tiles, streak counts) render in serif_brand to carry gravity.
typography.line_height_rule: Body 1.55. Card title 1.3. Page title 1.1. Never below 1.25 in body zones.

spacing.rule: One rhythm across the product. If a screen feels cramped, it is violating card_padding or card_gap — fix at the token, not the page.

elevation_and_edges.border: 1px solid edge_soft. Never a darker gray. Shadow is secondary to border.
elevation_and_edges.feel_metaphor: Paper, slate, glass, and ink — never dashboards, widgets, or neon.

status_dot.rule: Every card that has an operational state must show a dot. No text legend in-card — legend lives at the zone footer once.

card.rule: Every card variant in the product (proposal, person, project, commitment, memory, task, execution record, channel) inherits this anatomy. Density may vary. Species does not.

icon_disc.fill: one of accent_family at 0.55 opacity over bg_panel
icon_disc.rule: Icon disc is the visual category tell. Color == category. Never decorative.

pill.selected: primary_actionable bg, ink_inverse label, no border
pill.rule: Pills group mutually-exclusive modes (top-N, chart type, cohort). Never use a pill for a destructive or irreversible action.

segmented_control.composition: row of 2–5 pills sharing a common label

chip.use: Category tag, status tag, attribution slice.

checklist_panel.rule: This is the canonical project, workflow, and multi-step-decision surface. Prefer it over forms for anything the user steps through.

decision_grid.description: A row of 6–10 small decision cards used IN PLACE OF a multiple-choice question, a radio group, or a select dropdown. Channel picker is the reference.
decision_grid.rule: Whenever the app needs the operator to pick one of N, prefer a decision_grid over a form control. This is the product's signature interaction.

markdown_panel.description: A full-width reading surface that rides on bg_panel, uses the full type tier stack, and is allowed to render charts, tables, checkboxes, and rich text inline. The Anchor-the-Close-sweep view is the reference.
markdown_panel.rule: Project pages, decision writeups, and post-mortems all take this form. Never reduce them to a form.

kpi_tile.rule: Serif on the number. Always show the unit and the period.

attribution_donut.legend: label column (body), share column (right-aligned, ink_muted), count column (right-aligned, ink_primary)
attribution_donut.selected_slice: raised outline at 2px primary_actionable, legend row highlighted with bg_panel
attribution_donut.controls: segmented pills for top-N, chart mode (donut / sparkline grid / table), cohort (all / converted only)

context_menu.trigger: right-click on any addressable object (lead card, person card, commitment, memory, checklist row, ledger entry, chat message, attribution slice, status dot)
context_menu.anatomy: shadow.hover, radius modal/2, ink_primary labels, ink_muted shortcut hints on the right
context_menu.rule: Right-click menus are a product-wide primitive, not a per-page nicety. Every addressable object must surface its action set via right-click in addition to its inline controls.

rodbot_draft_surface.description: The Rodbot-first replacement for a blank form. Wherever the app needs input, Rodbot drafts it and the operator accepts / tweaks / rejects.
anatomy: small 'why this draft' disclosure (evidence chips linking source)
rodbot_draft_surface.fallback: If Rodbot abstains (thin signal), the surface says so in one line and offers a minimal, human-authored prompt set — not a blank form.

global_shell.nav_behavior: Sticky. Transparent over bg_paper until scroll, then adds 1px edge_soft.

content_zones.context_header: Who / what / when — orients the operator in one glance.
content_zones.primary_work_surface: Where decisions are made. The densest zone.
content_zones.action_zone: Commit, delegate, abstain. Always distinct from primary.
content_zones.reflection_status_zone: Ledger, streak, last-touched, what Rodbot noticed.

layout_grammar.rule: Even when layouts differ, the operator must subconsciously know where to understand, where to act, where to inspect, where to see state.

state_model.rule: Every stateful object exposes both its lifecycle state AND its trust position. Two dots, two chips, two cues — never collapsed into one signal.

motion_language.success_ack: Subtle pulse or check — never confetti, never toast explosions.
motion_language.ai_activity_indicator: Slow breathing dot or typing-rhythm ellipsis. Watchful, not flashy.
motion_language.rule: If a motion is louder than the fact it represents, cut the motion.

rules: Poetic in page framing, plain in controls.
Honest about uncertainty — 'I don't have enough to say yet' is a valid output.
No filler language. No fake enthusiasm.
Lowercase action labels ('draft', 'ship', 'abstain') unless the word carries gravity ('Delegate', 'Reassign').
copy_voice.inherits_from: Rodbot/character.md — the character sheet IS the product's copy voice. No second voice.

ai_presence.principle: The AI must behave like one consistent presence across the app — not a chatbot here, automation there, analytics somewhere else.

ui_tells.noticing: A Rodbot chip appears in the reflection_status_zone with the observation, linking to evidence.
ui_tells.proposing: A decision_grid of 2–6 proposal cards appears — never a paragraph of suggestions.
ui_tells.drafting: A rodbot_draft_surface with accept / tweak / rewrite.
ui_tells.abstaining: A single italic line in annotation tier: 'not enough to say yet — {named_gap}.'

forbidden: Language that performs intelligence instead of demonstrating it.
Any copy that makes the AI sound like a coworker seeking validation.

human_authority_model.reversibility_tell: Destructive or irreversible actions get a 2px primary_actionable outline + a one-line confirm. Reversible actions execute inline.

every_stateful_object_exposes: source of truth (file, CRM id, message id)
evidence_model.ui: An evidence chip row beneath the card title when expanded. Each chip is clickable to the source. Rodbot drafts cite via chip, not via inline URL.

must_answer: what the operator can do next

form_philosophy.default_stance: Minimize forms. Every form in the app is a surface where Rodbot failed to draft.
cascade: 1. Prefer a decision_grid (pick 1 of N) over any form.
2. If input is unavoidable, use a rodbot_draft_surface so the operator edits a draft, not a blank field.
3. If even the draft is impossible, use the shortest form possible — labels that sound human, helper text that explains consequence, not syntax.
forbidden: forms that ask for information the system already has

time_model.principle: Time is rhythm and memory — not a stamp.
time_model.every_page_should_reveal: where this thing sits in time — fresh, active, stale, overdue, archived, recurring, shipped, remembered.
time_model.relative_time_preferred: '3 days quiet', 'last touched yesterday', 'shipped Apr 22' over ISO stamps. ISO stamps live in right-click → copy ref.

people_model.rule: People are not rows. A person tile always carries relationship state, not just identity.

commitment_model.principle: A proposal, task, delegation, calendar mark, person follow-up, project deliverable, outgoing message, and ledger entry are all kinds of commitment. Treat them uniformly.
commitment_model.rule: One primitive. Many faces. The UI for a draft message and a project milestone should be recognizable as cousins.

reflection_model.principle: Every zone carries a thin reflective layer — what changed, what mattered, what is blocked, what pattern is emerging, what deserves attention, what should be remembered.
reflection_model.implementation: A reflection_status_zone on every page, even if it renders one line. Rodbot owns it.

meaning_layer.the_meaning_of_life_thread: Help the operator live inside the work with coherence, memory, responsibility, and human significance.
how_it_surfaces: the system occasionally names why a thing matters
what a streak actually represents (not just the count)
who is affected by a commitment
what kind of company is being built through these repeated actions
how today's work fits into a longer story
forbidden: anything that would read like LinkedIn
meaning_layer.voice: A single reflective sentence that reconnects action to purpose. No more than one per page per session.

patterns_to_spread.description: Jake explicitly flagged three surfaces as the target aesthetic. These become the product's spine.

spine_patterns.name: decision_grid
spine_patterns.reference: Channel picker. Replace every select / radio group / paragraph-of-choices with a 6–10 card grid.

spine_patterns.name: markdown_panel
spine_patterns.reference: Anchor the Close sweep. Replace every project page, workflow writeup, and multi-step plan with a markdown panel carrying checklists, charts, and inline evidence.

spine_patterns.name: attribution_donut
spine_patterns.reference: Attribution — share of all leads. Replace every raw-table analytics view with a segmented-pill-controlled chart + legend pair.

context_menu_pattern.name: right_click_everywhere
context_menu_pattern.reference: Jake's explicit ask. Every addressable object gets a custom context menu — see primitives.context_menu.baseline_actions_per_kind.

rodbot_first_input.name: rodbot_drafts_over_forms
rodbot_first_input.reference: Jake's explicit ask — 'everywhere we can possibly manage it, we always want Rodbot to have the ability to write things for us.' Every form surface gets a Rodbot draft above it; form is fallback only.

page_checklist.use: Paste this checklist into every new page review. A page ships when every answer is yes.
questions: Identity — Does this page feel like the same mind built it?
Thesis — Does it clearly embody one of the five roles (notice / judge / route / remember / reflect)?
Environment — Does it use bg_paper, bg_panel, edge_soft, and the ink tiers — no other grays?
Palette — Does it use at most one accent color on this zone?
Type — Serif for identity / page title / section title / hero numerals; sans for everything operational?
Spacing — Card padding and gap match the token scale?
Primitives — Any form? If yes, is a decision_grid or rodbot_draft_surface possible instead?
Context menu — Every addressable object has its right-click menu?
State — Every stateful object shows lifecycle state AND trust position?
Evidence — Can the operator click through to the source of every claim?
Copy — Does every line sound like Rodbot, not generic UI?
AI presence — Is Rodbot's surface consistent with the four UI tells (notice / propose / draft / abstain)?
Human authority — Is reversible vs irreversible visibly distinct?
Time — Does the page reveal where its contents sit in time, in relative language?
Empty state — If empty, does it orient / reassure / invite / clarify?
Meaning — Does the page connect activity to memory, judgment, relationship, or purpose — at most once?

phase_1_tokens: Publish CSS variables for color_palette, typography, spacing, elevation_and_edges.
Replace all hard grays with edge_soft / ink_* tokens.
Bump cache-busters in Secretary.html per CLAUDE.md note.
phase_2_primitives: Ship card, pill, chip, status_dot, icon_disc as shared components.
Ship checklist_panel and decision_grid as shared components.
Ship context_menu as a product-wide primitive.
phase_3_rodbot_presence: Wire the four AI-presence UI tells (notice / propose / draft / abstain) to Rodbot's existing memory + inbox pipeline.
phase_4_meaning: Ship the meaning-layer single-sentence reflection on key pages.

forbidden_globally: Generic tooltips — use evidence chips instead.
Toast explosions and confetti — see motion_language.
Blank forms where a Rodbot draft is possible.
Radio groups and selects where a decision_grid is possible.

governance.change_rule: Any deviation from this spec in a delegation must be flagged in the return summary and proposed as a v-bump amendment — not silently introduced.
governance.amendment_process: Bump version, append rationale to design_system_v1.md change-log section, update this file, re-register.

glossary.bedrock: The CCAgentindex directory — the app's source of truth for state.
glossary.Rodbot: The one AI presence across the app. Voice defined in Rodbot/identity.md, character.md, traits.md, affective_essence.md.
glossary.commitment: Any unit of work the team has taken responsibility for — draft, task, delegation, follow-up, shipment, all count.
glossary.gesture: A small operator action (a click, a check, a draft accepted) logged to _ledger/activity.jsonl.
glossary.evidence chip: A small clickable chip that links a claim to its source.

notes_for_future_claude: When asked to build or redesign a page in this app, read this file first. Do not introduce new primitives without proposing a version bump. Prefer reusing a named primitive over inventing a bespoke one. When in doubt about a color, spacing, or type choice, the token answer is in this file — use it.
